raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find logs older than 1 day in /var/log, tar.gz them. Command: tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1). But need to handle spaces. Use -print0 and tar --null -T. So: tar czf logs.tar.gz --null -T <(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1 -print0). But tar expects file list, not null? Use tar czf logs.tar.gz -C /var/log $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1 -printf '%P\n'). Simpler: tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1). Provide one line.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need find logs older than 1 day in /var/log, tar.gz them. Command: tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1). But need to handle spaces. Use -print0 and tar --null -T. So: tar czf logs.tar.gz --null -T <(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1 -print0). But tar expects file list, not null? Use tar czf logs.tar.gz -C /var/log $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1 -printf '%P\n'). Simpler: tar czf logs.tar.gz $(find /var/log -type f -mtime +1). Provide one line.
